item.title: Oceania-Athletics-Competition
item.description: Ebenezer Saukuru has won a silver medal in the Under-18 Boys' Javelin Throw event at the Darwin Oceania Athletics Competition in Australia. The Marist Brothers High Schoo
item.content:encoded: Ebenezer Saukuru has won a silver medal in the Under-18 Boys' Javelin Throw event at the Darwin Oceania Athletics Competition in Australia. The Marist Brothers High Schoo

item.title: Rugby-League
item.description: James Tedesco has been named at fullback for the NSW Blues ahead of the opening game of the 2026 State of Origin series at Sydneyâ€™s Accor Stadium next week.Tedesco
